creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
From <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-quarterly/blob/dd370a722759f467644d7bb97af559f64793aee0/README.adoc> (archived): 

> … please, do not squash or force-push (doing so will make the next 
> review much more difficult). …

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/freebsd-status-report-process/> lacks this discouragement. 

I can prepare a patch, for attachment to this bug report. 

Thanks to @salvadore for helping me to rediscover the archived point of reference.
